message:
✨ Standardize modal backdrop blur (24px) across all overlays (#1774)

* ✨ Standardize modal backdrop blur to backdrop-blur-xl across all overlays

Unified all modal/dialog overlays to use consistent bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl
(24px). Previously, overlays varied between no blur, backdrop-blur-sm (4px), and
backdrop-blur-lg (16px). This creates a cohesive visual language across:

- DrillDownModal, RemediationConsole
- MissionBrowser, SaveResolutionDialog, ShareMissionDialog
- ClusterSelectionDialog, ImproveMissionDialog
- MissionSidebar (mobile + confirm dialog)
- AlertBadge, Navbar mobile menu

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Increase backdrop blur from 24px to 40px (backdrop-blur-2xl)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Apply backdrop blur to remaining 7 overlays missed in initial pass

Addresses Copilot review: Sidebar, NamespaceMonitor, CardConfigModal,
GitHubInvite, LinkedInShare, FeedbackModal, and FeatureRequestModal
now also use bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl for full consistency.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -262,7 +262,7 @@ export function FeatureRequestModal({ isOpen, onClose, initialTab, initialContex
       {showLoginPrompt && (
         <>
           <div
-            className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-[10001]"
+            className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl z-[10001]"
             onClick={() => setShowLoginPrompt(false)}
           />
           <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[10001] flex items-center justify-center p-4 pointer-events-none">

@@ -105,7 +105,7 @@ export function FeedbackModal({ isOpen, onClose, initialType = 'feature' }: Feed
   const coins = type === 'bug' ? REWARD_ACTIONS.bug_report.coins : REWARD_ACTIONS.feature_suggestion.coins
 
   return createPortal(
-    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[9999] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm">
+    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[9999] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl">
       <div className="bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-lg mx-4 overflow-hidden">
         {/* Header */}
         <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border bg-secondary/30">

@@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ export function ClusterSelectionDialog({ open, missionTitle, onSelect, onCancel
   if (!open) return null
 
   return (
-    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
+    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl">
       <div className="w-full max-w-md rounded-lg border border-border bg-card shadow-xl">
         {/* Header */}
         <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-border">

@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ export function LinkedInShareButton() {
 
       {/* Confirmation Modal */}
       {showConfirm && (
-        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm">
+        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl">
           <div className="bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-2xl w-full max-w-sm mx-4 p-6">
             <div className="text-center">
               <div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-blue-600/20 flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
